response:
```sql
DELIMITER $$

CREATE PROCEDURE RemoveInactiveUsers()
BEGIN
    DECLARE EXIT HANDLER FOR SQLEXCEPTION
    BEGIN
        ROLLBACK;
        SELECT 'An error occurred during the deletion process.' AS ErrorMessage;
    END;

    START TRANSACTION;

    -- Delete all inactive users from the users table
    DELETE FROM users
    WHERE status = 'Inactive';

    -- Log the deletion in the status_log table
    INSERT INTO status_log (user_id, status, modification_date)
    SELECT user_id, 'Inactive', NOW()
    FROM users
    WHERE status = 'Inactive';

    COMMIT;

    SELECT 'Inactive users have been successfully removed.' AS StatusMessage;
END$$

DELIMITER ;
```
